mapper.sql: id, provider_id, credential_type, encrypted_key, encrypted_secret, token_value, expire_at, status
mapper.select: select from provider_credentials where provider_id = #{providerId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by id desc limit 1

select from provider_credentials where status = 'ACTIVE' and provider_id in
#{pid}
mapper.insert: insert into provider_credentials(provider_id, credential_type, encrypted_key, encrypted_secret, token_value, expire_at, status) values(#{providerId}, #{credentialType}, #{encryptedKey}, #{encryptedSecret}, #{tokenValue}, #{expireAt}, #{status})
mapper.update: update provider_credentials set credential_type = #{credentialType}, encrypted_key = #{encryptedKey}, encrypted_secret = #{encryptedSecret}, token_value = #{tokenValue}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update provider_credentials set status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where provider_id = #{providerId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
